title: Silent Hill Revisited
description: Silent Hill Revisited is the new Official Updated Resource pack from the Spectacular Silent Hill Resource Pack by RedXuchilbara
body:
# **Welcome to the New and Improved Official Silent Hill Texture Pack!**

This is the Original Silent Hill Texture pack by RedXuchilbara, updated to the newest versions of minecraft by Usaki. All Credit goes to Original Creator

Original Texture pack by RedXuchilbara

Pack Info:
-----------------------------------------------------
Version 1.21+ also works with 1.16 - 1.21+

Optifine is Optional

Survival Friendly

Does it work with Sodium/Iris?
------------------------------------------------------
Yes! It 100% works with sodium and Iris with optional fabric mods of your choosing

Extra new features with shaders: PBR & Reflections
-----------------------------------------------------
Ready for a Silent Hill Experience in your Minecraft World?
All the old textures of the original outdated pack have been updated and have their classic look!
New textures have been added and made to expand the original pack to give map makers more creative freedom and for survival players so their worlds don't look weird
What else?
Mobs, items, dimensions, custom sounds and more!!

Want to Support? Go give the the original creator RedXuchilbara some love for their work, you can find them on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/redxuchilbara/) or [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lobselvith_black)
